content: *경이 물품, 고급 (조율 필요)* --- 이 목걸이를 착용하는 동안 어떠한 환경에서도 정상적으로 호흡할 수 있으며, [중독](/1def7f5a1e8081dba641ffc9954d9129?pvs=25) 상태를 피하거나 해제하기 위한 내성 굴림에 [유리 보정](/1def7f5a1e8081b987fdda6f31ea4ec4?pvs=25)을 받습니다. --- ![](https://prod-files-secure.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/8dffc202-0f6e-4adf-b208-fc378f0d8bf3/2612d848-87f4-4c1c-93e8-f1b4ff96fe97/636284754852978679.jpeg?X-Amz-Algorithm=AWS4-HMAC-SHA256&X-Amz-Content-Sha256=UNSIGNED-PAYLOAD&X-Amz-Credential=ASIAZI2LB4665RNAIJ62%2F20260616%2Fus-west-2%2Fs3%2Faws4_request&X-Amz-Date=20260616T093635Z&X-Amz-Expires=3600&X-Amz-Security-Token=IQoJb3JpZ2luX2VjEKf%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2F%2FwEaCXVzLXdlc3QtMiJIMEYCIQD7kIHJfa0EYyqpUHLaAOhM5ECzh6P1cdxABomv5sKQBgIhAORv9YRoLRtUDDnjIqbJyoLACrKYPUGVDPnW5cQrLoQOKv8DCHAQABoMNjM3NDIzMTgzODA1Igwa1r9PnV5UIbpyywYq3AMMQsZe%2FJipCEF67rxOwgw8lp6JFW%2FGKeBsf1C5bB7IpuH9Xn9MqX1SaLj41%2BFPsuSu8hjjFdEg%2B8id1toDGrFW4FnS4RS0pnx7dffGMIB4%2B5JYkzywClf7JT5Q6of88D8KjIVaCoOEWR3q2dZIEv2aJF9k%2FT%2F2wajzakVsX8N9hbnzdEWtqA9sRlctJbk9dNpoycIHkXsR17kxHkgzuMxQ9BWEonbIjuRHKpqIxWTtJ2LEsU8UaLr7r6xV%2BX1kZR7JAfCUvImYv2Fv%2BmVcsj9o7O3QR97AJpOFQSh8%2BAiGwXP2OXNHiTfYMjo43CBc2BrIkI5SizIvq6E3%2B2SBOsFXF9NBz7tWk4nn%2B4Yvyxr7UE6aFVZz48ayZrYs4IM4DhHia2QGm2V%2B2eXTCf3tpxGKfzXVJuIJZG9b5zn9DpyoeTA2pLuqGGalnmiPeuWAW4ZQyJAMbwCGJHI6AARg5iKF%2BkilmhFwD1cawS3f6%2B8nYHAGTtrAX%2B%2BFJ6wF2xRqS%2Bg5bA%2F%2BGYX9CaN1iB6mBGE8ZFtZyGu2E1vIVr2jWoPd3FdpC849lqCpRjkF1MaeIXdjhA3KInKl0h99DOk81xFCs2hC5%2BNm0VKxZVMK6xOZEWGP%2B3PH32FFMkb3IDCP3MPRBjqkAXxK%2FXfU7Hc6IIe4rl7Nu%2FZKXEMBfOjR5BMktDtF5S9ISmmEBHK7tSDnugNEo1ZRJKLpjUg%2FQpxZCwDAeAg1YFKzd5pomZJDpFgf635l5ENMfjVoJemqQsa4TWF7KRXsvyEYFmE%2FGhlGn4l6PPSM6nyPCq7D3uOkDTG9qHYdHUMSjOAXAm9TDYFXsoZvXiw874GMja33iPXA2ofnUAYlS5PCmrdQ&X-Amz-Signature=5e4c88cc717932b5610ca7da9d59065b0150986b8f0d4ad9285cc6abaf61f140&X-Amz-SignedHeaders=host&x-amz-checksum-mode=ENABLED&x-id=GetObject)
